classFeatures.name: Opposition Alignment
classFeatures.description: A divine scion must pick one of the following alignment subtypes as her opposition alignment : chaotic, evil, good, or law. The opposition alignment she chooses must be one that she does not possess as part of her own alignment . She gains a +1 bonus on caster level checks made to overcome spell resistance of creatures with that alignment subtype.

Every time a divine scion casts a domain spell from her specialized domain, she heals damage equal to twice the spellÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s level. In addition, each domain specialization grants a spell-like ability (which functions at a caster level equal to the divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s total character level) and a permanent sacred bonus (or profane, if the divine scion is evil) on a single type of d20 roll. classFeatures.name: Divine Wrath
classFeatures.description: At 4th level, a divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s damaging spells deal +1 point of damage per die against creatures with an alignment subtype that matches the divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s opposition alignment .

classFeatures.name: Deific Defense
classFeatures.description: At 7th level, a divine scion gains DR 2, bypassed by attacks with the alignment subtype of her opposition alignment (so a divine scion with ÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã…â€œevilÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã‚Â as her opposition alignment gains DR 2/evil).

classFeatures.name: Divine Awe
classFeatures.description: At 8th level, a divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s spells can stagger creatures that match the alignment subtypes of the divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s opposition alignment . When such a creature is affected by a divine scionÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢s spell, it is staggered for 1 round if it fails its save against that spell. If the creature makes its save (or if the spell doesnÃƒÂ¢Ã¢â€šÂ¬Ã¢â€žÂ¢t allow a saving throw), this ability has no effect.

classFeatures.name: True Scion
classFeatures.description: At 10th level, a divine scion becomes a true scion of her deity. The amount of healing she gains from her domain specialization doubles. Her divine wrath ability now deals +2 points of damage per die against creatures of the appropriate alignment . The damage reduction granted by her deific defense increases to 5. Finally, she permanently increases her Wisdom or Charisma score (her choice) by +1. Section 15: Copyright Notice Pathfinder Campaign Setting: Inner Sea Magic.
